examples: Have some respect for me, you scamp!
"You scamp!" said Mother Bear to Little Bear.
Don't pamper damp scamp tramps that camp under ramp lamps.
Most of all, nurture that inner scamp by taking a few risks yourself.
After the team stocks up on Florida clams, more Royal Reds, Spanish mackerel, red snapper and scamp, a superior member of the grouper family, we head down Highway 98 toward Seaside, 75 miles away.
